subcodes.first_line: O Solace of God! Relief hath indeed come, yet the people have turned away therefrom. The Most Great Joy hath been made manifest in this horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فرج الله قد اتی الفرج و الناس عنه معرضون قد ظهر الفرح الاکبر فی هذا المنظر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
